hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; src=$(chezmoi source-path "$f" 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ -n "$src" ] || exit 0; jq -nc --arg s "$src" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"ask",permissionDecisionReason:("Chezmoi-managed file. Source: \($s). Approve to edit the live file directly, or cancel and edit the source then run `chezmoi apply`.")}}'; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.md|*.markdown) npx --yes markdownlint-cli2 --fix "$f" ;; esac } 2>/dev/null || true
